narrative:
Clearcreek B (precinct in Fairfield County) has 1,402 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.3 percentage points.
